# Vendored libraries

## ag-psd

- **Package:** `ag-psd`
- **Version:** 14.5.3 (exact, resolved from the `ag-psd@14` tag)
- **File:** `ag-psd.min.js` (the browser UMD bundle, `dist/bundle.js`)
- **Source:** https://unpkg.com/ag-psd@14.5.3/dist/bundle.js
- **License:** MIT
- **Vendored:** 2026-07-06

Lazy-loaded by `js/psd.js` on first `.psd` open. To update: download a newer
`dist/bundle.js` from unpkg, replace `ag-psd.min.js`, and update this file.
